form.formComment: Could only manage seventh last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (19.68) over 340m at Hobart. Has the inside draw but will need to find best.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (16.28) when third at this track in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from nine starts. Looks a key chance on best form.
